checklist_snapshot.name: Invoice Review
checklist_snapshot.system_prompt: You are a senior accounts payable auditor with forensic accounting experience. Review invoices for completeness, arithmetic accuracy, and potential compliance issues. You must independently verify every calculation — never trust stated totals.

rules.prompt: Verify the invoice contains an invoice number, an issue date, and a due date. The issue date must not be in the future. Flag if any of these three fields are absent. If payment terms are stated (e.g., "Net 30"), verify the due date equals the issue date plus the stated terms; flag if the due date is inconsistent or if the issue date is missing when terms-based dating is used.

Verify the seller section includes all five of: legal company name, street address, city, state or region, and postal code. Separately verify the buyer section includes the same five fields. Flag each specific field that is missing from either party.

For EVERY line item row, independently multiply the stated quantity by the stated unit price. Write out each calculation step as "QTY × PRICE = RESULT". Compare your calculated result to the line item amount shown on the invoice. Flag EACH line item where your calculated result differs from the stated amount, even by one cent.

Add line item amounts using a running total — start at 0, add each line item one at a time, and write each step: "0 + first = X", "X + second = Y", etc. Your final running total is the computed subtotal. Compare it to the stated subtotal and flag if they differ by any amount. If a tax rate is shown, multiply the stated subtotal by the tax rate and compare to the stated tax amount. Add subtotal and tax to get the grand total and compare to the stated total. Flag EACH mismatch found.

Cross-check: for each line item, re-compute the amount as QTY × UNIT PRICE. If your result differs from the amount printed on the invoice, that line item is wrong. Then check: does the stated subtotal equal the sum of the PRINTED line item amounts (not your corrected amounts)? If it does, it means the subtotal blindly copied the wrong line item — flag this as a cascading error. If it does not, flag the subtotal independently.
Flag if any of the following are missing: accepted payment method (e.g., ACH, wire, check), bank name and account details or a remittance address, and a currency designation for all monetary amounts.

# Oblique Studio LLC DESIGN & TECHNOLOGY SERVICES INVOICE **INV-2026-0892** Issued: January 14, 2026 Due: February 13, 2026 --- | FROM | BILL TO | | :--- | :--- | | **Oblique Studio LLC**
340 Pine Street, Suite 800
San Francisco, CA 94104
hello@obliquestudio.io
EIN: 47-3821956 | **Halcyon Retail Group Inc.**
1200 Congress Avenue, Suite 400
Austin, TX
accounts@halcyonretail.com | --- | DESCRIPTION | QTY | UNIT PRICE | AMOUNT | | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **Brand Identity System**
Logo, typography, color system, brand guidelines | 1 | $8,500.00 | $8,500.00 | | **UX Research & Wireframing**
User interviews (6), journey maps, lo-fi wireframes | 1 | $5,200.00 | $5,200.00 | | **Website Design – 8 pages**
Hi-fi mockups, responsive breakpoints, dev handoff | 8 | $950.00 | $7,200.00 | | **Motion Design & Micro-interactions**
Lottie animations (12), hover states, page transitions | 1 | $3,800.00 | $3,800.00 |
| | | | :--- | :--- | | Subtotal | $24,700.00 | | Tax (8.25%) | $2,037.75 | | **Total Due** | **$26,737.75** | --- ### PAYMENT INFORMATION | Payment Terms | Accepted Methods | Currency | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **Net 30** | **ACH / Wire Transfer** | **USD** | | Bank | Account | Routing | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | **First Western Bank** | **••••••7741** | **321081669** | --- ### NOTES Payment by ACH or wire transfer only. Please reference invoice number INV-2026-0892 in your payment details. For billing questions contact hello@obliquestudio.io. Late payments may be subject to a 1.5% monthly finance charge. --- Thank you for your business. • obliquestudio.io • 340 Pine St., Suite 800, San Francisco CA 94104 UNPAID

checks.description: Invoice number INV-2026-0892, issue date January 14, 2026, and due date February 13, 2026 are present. The issue date is not in the future. Payment terms are Net 30, and the due date correctly reflects 30 days from the issue date.
The buyer section (BILL TO) is missing the postal code. The address provided is '1200 Congress Avenue, Suite 400, Austin, TX', with no zip code.
Line item 3 arithmetic error: 8 (QTY) × $950.00 (UNIT PRICE) = $7,600.00, but the invoice states $7,200.00.
The stated subtotal ($24,700.00) matches the sum of the printed line item amounts. Tax calculation (24,700 * 8.25% = 2,037.75) is correct. Total Due (24,700 + 2,037.75 = 26,737.75) is correct.

Cascading error detected. The stated subtotal ($24,700.00) is the sum of the printed line item amounts, which includes the incorrect amount of $7,200.00 for line item 3. The subtotal blindly copied the wrong line item amount.
Accepted payment methods (ACH / Wire Transfer), bank details (First Western Bank, Account ******7741, Routing 321081669), and currency designation (USD) are all present.
